ocr_findings.description: Final bullet point is truncated mid-sentence: OCR ends with 'CGMとは、一般消費者（個人）がインターネット' without completing the definition. The image shows additional text continuing the sentence (likely '上でコンテンツを生成・共有する仕組み' or similar). Key term definition incomplete.

reviewer_notes: Dense bullet-point summary page covering strategy terms (BSC/CSF/KPI/ERP/CRM/SFA/SCM), innovation terms (ハッカソン/APIエコノミー/キャズム), and technology terms (NFC/GPS/AI/CAD/CAM/JIT). The vast majority of bullets are faithfully captured. The truncation of the final CGM definition is a medium-severity gap since it leaves a key term definition incomplete. All other ~40 bullet points appear accurate.
